item.title: Digital Picture Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Effective Digital Picture Data Recovery application download link is available at www.datarecoverybook.com to recover and restore multiple file format supported images without losing picture quality. Most powerful image restoration application retrieves lost media files after being deleted from recycle bin folder without requiring professional guidance.
[read more]
item.description:
Digital Picture Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Effective Digital Picture Data Recovery application download link is available at www.datarecoverybook.com to recover and restore multiple file format supported images without losing picture quality. Most powerful image restoration application retrieves lost media files after being deleted from recycle bin folder without requiring professional guidance.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Picture Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Effective Digital Picture Data Recovery application download link is available at www.datarecoverybook.com to recover and restore multiple file format supported images without losing picture quality. Most powerful image restoration application retrieves lost media files after being deleted from recycle bin folder without requiring professional guidance.
[read more]

item.title: hashSum [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: hashSum [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]
item.description:
hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]

hashSum
(Utilities)
Please visit https://gitlab.com/posktomten/hashsum/-/wikis/home
A program for calculating hash sums.
- Text to speech
- Choose whether you want to calculate the hash sums, or compare two files
- You can choose the calculation algorithm. (MD4, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, SHA3_224, SHA3_256, SHA3_384, SHA3_512, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_384 and KECCAK_512)
- You can create lists of checksums that are stored as a text file.
- You can recursively create lists of hash sum files.
- Ability to search recursively for file duplicates.
- You can compare against a selected hash sum.
- You can check which files have changed, who's new and what has been lost since the last time you checked.
- You can choose the operating system's "Open" and "Save" dialogues, or the program's own lists of checksums can be auto saved.
- You can calculate and compare hashsummor for text strings.
- You can choose a default filename to save the checksum lists.
- Swedish, Greek and English menus.
- The program can check for updates.
- The program supports "Drag and Drop".
- Create Debian md5sums
- Create Debian md5sums (auto)
[read more]

item.title: libselectfont [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: libselectfont [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
libselectfont
(Developers Apps)
Qt5 and Qt6 library to select font. An alternative to QFontDialog
For 32-bit and for 64-bit.
[read more]

Qt5 and Qt6 library to select font. An alternative to QFontDialog
For 32-bit and for 64-bit.

For 32-bit and for 64-bit.
[read more]

item.title: Qt Linguist [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Qt Linguist [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]
item.description:

(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qt Linguist
(Developers Apps)
This is not an official Qt company release, just alternative download.
Qt Linguist is a tool for adding translations to Qt applications.
Copyright (C) 2018 - 2024 The Qt Company Ltd.

The purpose of this project is to offer the opportunity to translate programs created in the Qt development environment without having to download and install the entire Qt IDE.

[read more]

item.title: Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6 [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6 [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: lamka02sk
item.itunes:summary:
Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6
(Utilities)
Supports Plasma 6.0+
Simple Split Clock widget is a simple plasmoid that displays clock split into 2 lines. Ideal for your vertical panels.
Widget contains only clock, no calendar or settings. It is as simple as it can possibly get. I don't have skill or time to develop more functionality at the moment. Sorry
[read more]
item.description:
Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6
(Utilities)
Supports Plasma 6.0+
Simple Split Clock widget is a simple plasmoid that displays clock split into 2 lines. Ideal for your vertical panels.
Widget contains only clock, no calendar or settings. It is as simple as it can possibly get. I don't have skill or time to develop more functionality at the moment. Sorry
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Simple Split Clock for Plasma 6
(Utilities)
Supports Plasma 6.0+
Simple Split Clock widget is a simple plasmoid that displays clock split into 2 lines. Ideal for your vertical panels.
Widget contains only clock, no calendar or settings. It is as simple as it can possibly get. I don't have skill or time to develop more functionality at the moment. Sorry
[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:

sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages

item.title: Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Website www.datarecoverybook.com is helpful for common users to download technically advance file rescue software for camera that restores lost images even if memory card is pulled from working camera. Well designed Camera Data Recovery application empowers general users to undelete missing data from commonly used digital cameras.
[read more]
item.description:
Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Website www.datarecoverybook.com is helpful for common users to download technically advance file rescue software for camera that restores lost images even if memory card is pulled from working camera. Well designed Camera Data Recovery application empowers general users to undelete missing data from commonly used digital cameras.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Website www.datarecoverybook.com is helpful for common users to download technically advance file rescue software for camera that restores lost images even if memory card is pulled from working camera. Well designed Camera Data Recovery application empowers general users to undelete missing data from commonly used digital cameras.
[read more]

item.title: Professional Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery program used to recover mp3, mp4, video, digital picture, personal documents, text, folder from storage media. Data recovery utility provides recovery of folder erased and missing file that lost due to power failure, and unexpected disk formatted damaged partition, fluctuation, natural disaster, software, and hardware problem. Revive tool has great friendly user interface with no technical training needed to operate.
[read more]
item.description:
Professional Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery program used to recover mp3, mp4, video, digital picture, personal documents, text, folder from storage media. Data recovery utility provides recovery of folder erased and missing file that lost due to power failure, and unexpected disk formatted damaged partition, fluctuation, natural disaster, software, and hardware problem. Revive tool has great friendly user interface with no technical training needed to operate.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional data recovery program used to recover mp3, mp4, video, digital picture, personal documents, text, folder from storage media. Data recovery utility provides recovery of folder erased and missing file that lost due to power failure, and unexpected disk formatted damaged partition, fluctuation, natural disaster, software, and hardware problem. Revive tool has great friendly user interface with no technical training needed to operate.
